query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Virginia Medicaid member benefits pages for state coverage and child-health program evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Benefits and Services available to Medicaid Members.

samples.sample_name: Virginia Maternal and Child Health Insurance Programs
samples.evidence_snippet: Virginia's Maternal and Child Health Insurance Programs include Family Access to Medical Insurance Security (FAMIS) and children's Medicaid.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Virginia Medicaid waiver pages for HCBS and DD waiver evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Medicaid waivers are home and community based offering supports and services to a Medicaid individual, both children and adults.
Developmental Disability (DD) Waivers include the Building Independence (BI), Family and Individual Support (FIS), and Community Living (CL) waivers.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live DBHDS developmental services pages for Virginia DD authority evidence.

samples.sample_name: DBHDS Developmental Services for Individuals and Families
samples.evidence_snippet: DBHDS strives to ensure that all individuals with developmental disabilities (DD) have access to quality support and services when and where they need them.
The same official page publishes Developmental Services Staff, including the DDS Assistant Commissioner and Waiver Network Supports Director.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live ITCVA statewide and local-routing pages for Virginia Part C evidence and local coverage.

samples.sample_name: Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia homepage
samples.evidence_snippet: The Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia is the Commonwealth's early intervention system for infants and toddlers with disabilities and their families.

samples.sample_name: ITCVA Part C lead agency statement
samples.evidence_snippet: DBHDS has proudly served as the Lead Agency for Virginia's implementation of Part C of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) since 1987.
Referrals to the Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia are made through and received by local central points of entry.
The Local System Managers directory publishes local managers and explicit 'Counties & Cities' coverage crosswalks such as Accomack County and Northampton County under Eastern Shore.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 browser-rendered official VDOE special-education page because raw fetch returned access-denied responses.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official page lists Special Education subpages including Information for Families, Evaluation and Eligibility, IEP and Instruction, Resolving Disputes, Reports, Plans and Statistics, and Virginia's Application for IDEA Part B Funds.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live Virginia School Quality Profiles archive and division detail pages for local education routing evidence.

samples.sample_name: Virginia School Quality Profiles divisions archive
samples.evidence_snippet: The public divisions archive offers Browse All Virginia Divisions and shows Results 1 to 30 of 133.

samples.sample_name: Fairfax County Public Schools Quality Profile
samples.evidence_snippet: The Fairfax County Public Schools detail page preserves Division Number 29, address, superintendent, region, and division website.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 browser-rendered official DARS student employment page because raw fetch returned access-denied responses on the canonical DARS host.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DARS page says services are available for students with disabilities as early as age 14, labels Pre-Employment Transition Services, and states that Vocational Rehabilitation Services help eligible students find and maintain employment.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live first-party dLCV homepage for explicit Virginia protection-and-advocacy designation.

samples.evidence_snippet: The disAbility Law Center of Virginia (dLCV) is the designated Protection and Advocacy organization for the Commonwealth of Virginia.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live first-party PEATC About page for explicit PTI designation language.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Parent Educational Advocacy Training Center (PEATC) is the parent information and training center serving families and professionals of children with disabilities in the Commonwealth of Virginia.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live first-party dLCV homepage for disability legal-aid service language.

samples.evidence_snippet: Using funding received from federal grants, we help clients with disability-related problems like abuse, neglect, and discrimination. We provide legal services and direct representation as resources allow.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live ABLEnow and Commonwealth Savers pages to replace the generic ABLE NRC source with Virginia-administered program evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: ABLEnow is administered by Commonwealth Savers Plan.
Virginia529 is now Commonwealth Savers.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Virginia DSS local-department directory for county/local disability and benefits routing evidence.

samples.sample_name: Virginia DSS Find Your Local Department
samples.evidence_snippet: Use this page to find your local department of social services in Virginia.
Search by county or use the filters to narrow results by region or department name.

samples.sample_name: Virginia DSS result count and sample cards
samples.evidence_snippet: The directory shows Results 1 - 10 of 121 and includes cards such as Accomack Department of Social Services, Albemarle County Department of Social Services, and Alleghany-Covington Department of Social Services.
